TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Maysang_Kalimud, title = Maysang_Kalimud, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maysang_Kalimud} }

S.FORM: Maysang Kalimud Maysang Kalimud, i saka10 no saka7 no falod to 1933 a mihecaan ko kahofocaan nira, tahira i saka27 no saka1 niyaro'no folad to 2007 a mihecaan ko 'orip nira. O Falangaway a tamdaw ko mira. 1960 a mihecaan mikihatiya to Olinpik . Pakatama to impay no tikaselon, malasa'ayaway pakaalaay to ngangan i Aw^in no Cong-howa-min-kok; o roma sa to, awaay ho ko roma a tamdaw a mikikaka to pakaalaay nira a tingso-9000, "C.K.Yang" ko cimil a ngangan nira. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: majsaŋ kaɾimo~u~uɬ~ɮ majsaŋ kaɾimo~u~uɬ~ɮ, i saka** no~u saka* no~u faɾo~uɬ~ɮ to~u **** a miħəʦaan ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦaan nira, taħira i saka** no~u saka* nijaro~uʡno~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u **** a miħəʦaan ko~u ʡo~urip nira. o~u faɾaŋawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mira. **** a miħəʦaan mikiħatija to~u o~uɾinpik . pakatama to~u impaj no~u tikasəɾo~un, maɾasaʡajawaj pakaaɾaaj to~u ŋaŋan i awʔin no~u ʦo~uŋ-ħo~uwa-min-ko~uk; o~u ro~uma sa to~u, awaaj ħo~u ko~u ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw a mikikaka to~u pakaaɾaaj nira a tiŋso~u-****, "ʦ.k.jaŋ" ko~u ʦimiɾ a ŋaŋan nira. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
S.FORM: Maysang Kalimud Maysang Kalimud, i saka10 no saka7 no falod to 1933 a mihecaan ko kahofocaan nira, tahira i saka27 no saka1 niyaro'no folad to 2007 a mihecaan ko 'orip nira. O Falangaway a tamdaw ko mira. 1960 a mihecaan mikihatiya to Olinpik . Pakatama to impay no tikaselon, malasa'ayaway pakaalaay to ngangan i Aw^in no Cong-howa-min-kok; o roma sa to, awaay ho ko roma a tamdaw a mikikaka to pakaalaay nira a tingso-9000, "C.K.Yang" ko cimil a ngangan nira. Pi'arawan to lakaw
S.PHON: majsaŋ kaɾimo~u~uɬ~ɮ majsaŋ kaɾimo~u~uɬ~ɮ, i saka** no~u saka* no~u faɾo~uɬ~ɮ to~u **** a miħəʦaan ko~u kaħo~ufo~uʦaan nira, taħira i saka** no~u saka* nijaro~uʡno~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ to~u **** a miħəʦaan ko~u ʡo~urip nira. o~u faɾaŋawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mira. **** a miħəʦaan mikiħatija to~u o~uɾinpik . pakatama to~u impaj no~u tikasəɾo~un, maɾasaʡajawaj pakaaɾaaj to~u ŋaŋan i awʔin no~u ʦo~uŋ-ħo~uwa-min-ko~uk; o~u ro~uma sa to~u, awaaj ħo~u ko~u ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw a mikikaka to~u pakaaɾaaj nira a tiŋso~u-****, "ʦ.k.jaŋ" ko~u ʦimiɾ a ŋaŋan nira. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw
